meaning: Community 库姆兰会社(旧时在死海西岸的一犹太教教团)
examples: In the time of Christ, the Essenes at Qumran were Jewish monks.
The inhabitants of Qumran may have been the leaders, or perhaps only a small branch, of a broad Essene movement.
In either case it is impossible to know just how and to what extent the Qumran documents reflect standard Essene practices and beliefs.
